summary: Decent (fair) recording of a visually spectacular show highlighted by an excellent Shakedown Street.
review: The three reviewers all give the concert four stars, noting an unforgettable light‑show during drum space and a standout rendition of Shakedown Street. The audio isn’t top‑tier – they describe it as “not the best recording, but not awful” – yet it’s still listenable enough to recommend the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about the show (visuals, Shakedown Street) offset a mediocre recording quality; three consistent 4‑star reviews give moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers say the recording isn’t great but also not terrible – no specific issues like dropouts are mentioned, just a generally average sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show is remembered for its impressive light effects during the drum space and an overall energetic vibe; reviewers felt it was a solid, enjoyable Dead experience despite not being a “must‑see” performance.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drummers wore red/white light‑up suits and created a striking visual drum space that reviewers highlighted.
